calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor and an Adult.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: I Peng Chio Wan in pro per for self and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ling In Chio.
Petitioner: Veng Hong Chio, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Ling In Chio. Parties were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Lloyd Long In Chio, and change of Name of an Adult to : Ellen I Peng Wan Chio.
Decree signed in open court.
